content: The BitCorn treasury node pubkey is 02b759b1552f6471599420c9aa8b7fb52c0a343ecc8a06157b452b5a3b107a1bca. It is hard-coded in docker-compose.yml and used for role detection across all member installs.

Port 3101 is User/Admin API (JWT, Umbrel-aware). Port 3109 is Node-to-Node API (HMAC only, never proxied). Port 3200 is the Web UI. Never reuse ports 3001 or 3009. Never expose 3109 via Umbrel app-proxy.

Before any channel open, capital-guardrails.ts checks: minimum on-chain reserve, max deploy ratio, max pending opens, per-peer capacity cap, peer cooldown period, daily expansion limit, daily total deploy limit. Returns 429 on violation. Safety > growth. Guardrails cannot be bypassed by automation.
